title: Academic Writing Basics
description: Introduction structure: hook, context, thesis. Academic vocabulary for essays.
summary_pt_br: Introduções acadêmicas: gancho, contexto, tese. Em vez de 'I think', use 'This essay argues'. Verbos: examine, analyze.

scenes.subtitle_en: Introduction structure: hook, context, thesis. Academic vocabulary for essays.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Introduções acadêmicas: gancho, contexto, tese. Em vez de 'I think', use 'This essay argues'. Verbos: examine, analyze.

scenes.text_en: Introduction structure: hook, context, thesis. Academic vocabulary for essays. Today's focus: academic writing basics. This essay argues that remote work benefits productivity.
scenes.text_pt: Introduções acadêmicas: gancho, contexto, tese. Em vez de 'I think', use 'This essay argues'. Verbos: examine, analyze. Foco de hoje: academic writing basics. Este ensaio defende que o trabalho remoto beneficia a produtividade.

scenes.title: Academic Writing Basics
scenes.body_en: Academic intros usually open with a hook, then funnel to the thesis. Avoid 'I think' — prefer 'This essay argues that...'. Verbs: examine, analyze, explore, demonstrate.
scenes.body_pt: Introduções acadêmicas: gancho, contexto, tese. Em vez de 'I think', use 'This essay argues'. Verbos: examine, analyze.

examples.en: This essay argues that remote work benefits productivity.
examples.pt: Este ensaio defende que o trabalho remoto beneficia a produtividade.

examples.en: We will examine three key dimensions of the problem.
The evidence demonstrates a clear correlation between X and Y.
examples.pt: As evidências demonstram uma correlação clara entre X e Y.

exercise.question: Complete: "This essay argues that remote work benefits ___."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "This essay argues that remote work benefits productivity."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Este ensaio defende que o trabalho remoto beneficia a produtividade.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
We will examine three key dimensions of the problem.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "We will examine three key dimensions of the problem."
Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Academic Writing Basics — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre academic writing basics. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Let's draft an academic introduction together. Start with a hook.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Millions of workers changed offices for kitchens overnight.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Good. Now add context in one sentence.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Remote work grew from niche to norm during the pandemic.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: This essay argues remote work improves productivity.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We will examine focus, flexibility, and results.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Close the intro by gesturing at evidence.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Evidence from three studies will support the argument.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Clean, confident, and grounded. That's an academic opening.

scenes.title: Kumar's introduction workshop
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize Kumar's four-step intro. Use at least two academic verbs.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the university prep class, Kumar drew four boxes on the board: hook, context, thesis, preview.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: This essay will examine how four simple moves can transform any academic introduction.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: Is it okay to start with a personal anecdote as the hook?

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Yes, as long as the anecdote funnels directly into the argument you intend to demonstrate.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: So the thesis should be the final sentence of the introduction paragraph?

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Writing, Kumar repeated each term, is architecture — and every good building starts at the foundation.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Academic Writing Basics". Introduction structure: hook, context, thesis. Academic vocabulary for essays. This essay argues that remote work benefits productivity. We will examine three key dimensions of the problem. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Academic Writing Basics". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Academic Writing Basics".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.pt_hint: Análise de notícias reais da BBC.

sources.label: TED Talks with subtitles
sources.pt_hint: Palestras reais com legenda — ouça, leia, repita.

sources.label: Cambridge Dictionary · thesaurus
sources.pt_hint: Sinônimos com exemplos — essencial em B2+.
